case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA VS. DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
